python3 -c "
from PIL import Image
import numpy as np
im = Image.open('/Users/amin/.cursor/projects/Users-amin-dev-p-projects-armenia-resume/assets/telegram-cloud-document-4-5967486840201028313-774e7825-d2b7-487e-a44d-2128f3c3f99e.png')
print(im.size, im.mode)
arr = np.array(im.convert('RGBA'))
# find non-white-ish pixels
alpha = arr[:,:,3]
rgb = arr[:,:,:3]
# treat near-white as background
is_bg = (rgb[:,:,0] > 245) & (rgb[:,:,1] > 245) & (rgb[:,:,2] > 245)
content = ~is_bg
rows = np.any(content, axis=1)
cols = np.any(content, axis=0)
r0, r1 = np.where(rows)[0][[0,-1]]
c0, c1 = np.where(cols)[0][[0,-1]]
print('content bbox', c0, r0, c1, r1)
# find horizontal bands of content to separate bird from text
row_density = content.sum(axis=1)
# print row ranges with content
in_run = False
for i, d in enumerate(row_density):
    if d > 5 and not in_run:
        start = i; in_run = True
    elif d <= 5 and in_run:
        print(f'band {start}-{i-1} dens_max={row_density[start:i].max()}')
        in_run = False
if in_run:
    print(f'band {start}-{len(row_density)-1} dens_max={row_density[start:].max()}')
"

import sys
w,h=1024,1024
data=sys.stdin.buffer.read()
assert len(data)==w*h*3
bands=[]; in_run=False
for y in range(h):
    # count non-near-white pixels
    off=y*w*3
    n=0
    for x in range(0,w,2):
        i=off+x*3
        r,g,b=data[i],data[i+1],data[i+2]
        if r<245 or g<245 or b<245:
            n+=1
    if n>8 and not in_run:
        start=y; in_run=True; mx=n
    elif n>8 and in_run:
        mx=max(mx,n)
    elif n<=8 and in_run:
        bands.append((start,y-1,mx)); in_run=False
if in_run: bands.append((start,h-1,mx))
print('bands', bands)
# also find col extent for top band (bird)
if bands:
    y0,y1,_=bands[0]
    xmin,xmax=w,0
    for y in range(y0,y1+1):
        off=y*w*3
        for x in range(w):
            i=off+x*3
            r,g,b=data[i],data[i+1],data[i+2]
            if r<245 or g<245 or b<245:
                xmin=min(xmin,x); xmax=max(xmax,x)
    print('bird bbox x',xmin,xmax,'y',y0,y1)
"

SRC="/Users/amin/.cursor/projects/Users-amin-dev-p-projects-armenia-resume/assets/telegram-cloud-document-4-5967486840201028313-774e7825-d2b7-487e-a44d-2128f3c3f99e.png"
ffmpeg -hide_banner -loglevel error -i "$SRC" -f rawvideo -pix_fmt rgb24 - 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys
w,h=1024,1024
data=sys.stdin.buffer.read()
y0,y1=200,650
xmin,xmax=w,0
ymin,ymax=h,0
for y in range(y0,y1+1):
    off=y*w*3
    for x in range(w):
        i=off+x*3
        r,g,b=data[i],data[i+1],data[i+2]
        if r<245 or g<245 or b<245:
            xmin=min(xmin,x); xmax=max(xmax,x)
            ymin=min(ymin,y); ymax=max(ymax,y)
print(xmin,ymin,xmax,ymax)
print('w',xmax-xmin+1,'h',ymax-ymin+1)
# pad to square-ish with margin
pad=24
left=max(0,xmin-pad); top=max(0,ymin-pad)
right=min(w-1,xmax+pad); bottom=min(h-1,ymax+pad)
cw=right-left+1; ch=bottom-top+1
side=max(cw,ch)
# center square crop
cx=(left+right)//2; cy=(top+bottom)//2
side=side+8
sl=max(0,cx-side//2); st=max(0,cy-side//2)
if sl+side>w: sl=w-side
if st+side>h: st=h-side
print('square crop', sl, st, side, side)
"

pip3 install pillow -q && python3 << 'PY'
from PIL import Image
import numpy as np

src = '/Users/amin/.cursor/projects/Users-amin-dev-p-projects-armenia-resume/assets/telegram-cloud-document-4-5967486840201028313-774e7825-d2b7-487e-a44d-2128f3c3f99e.png'
im = Image.open(src).convert('RGBA')
arr = np.array(im)
# crop bird region (before text starts ~672)
bird = arr[190:660, 250:780].copy()
# make near-white transparent
rgb = bird[:,:,:3].astype(np.float32)
# distance from white
dist = 255 - rgb.min(axis=2)  # how far from white on darkest channel
# softer: luminance closeness
white_dist = np.linalg.norm(rgb - 255, axis=2)
alpha = np.clip((white_dist - 8) / 25 * 255, 0, 255).astype(np.uint8)
bird[:,:,3] = alpha

out = Image.fromarray(bird)
# trim transparent
bbox = out.getbbox()
out = out.crop(bbox)
# add modest padding
pad = 24
canvas = Image.new('RGBA', (out.width + pad*2, out.height + pad*2), (0,0,0,0))
canvas.paste(out, (pad, pad))
print('final', canvas.size)

paths = [
  '/Users/amin/dev/p-projects/armenia/resume/homepage/public/brand/kuchup-bird.png',
  '/Users/amin/dev/p-projects/armenia/resume/relocation_jobs/static/icons/kuchup-bird.png',
]
import os
for p in paths:
    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(p), exist_ok=True)
    canvas.save(p, 'PNG')
    print('wrote', p)

# square favicon / app icons on transparent
def square_icon(size):
    # fit bird in size with padding
    margin = int(size * 0.08)
    inner = size - margin*2
    fitted = canvas.copy()
    fitted.thumbnail((inner, inner), Image.Resampling.LANCZOS)
    sq = Image.new('RGBA', (size, size), (0,0,0,0))
    sq.paste(fitted, ((size-fitted.width)//2, (size-fitted.height)//2), fitted)
    return sq

for size, name in [(32,'icon-32.png'), (192,'icon-192.png'), (512,'icon-512.png'), (180,'apple-touch-icon.png')]:
    ic = square_icon(size)
    # apple-touch often wants opaque bg - use soft off-white matching brand
    if 'apple' in name:
        bg = Image.new('RGBA', (size, size), (248, 248, 246, 255))
        bg.paste(ic, (0,0), ic)
        ic = bg
    dests = [
      f'/Users/amin/dev/p-projects/armenia/resume/homepage/public/brand/{name}',
      f'/Users/amin/dev/p-projects/armenia/resume/relocation_jobs/static/icons/{name}' if name != 'icon-32.png' else None,
    ]
    for d in dests:
        if d:
            ic.save(d, 'PNG')
            print('wrote', d)

# Also overwrite the existing icon-192/512/apple in static/icons
for size, name in [(192,'icon-192.png'), (512,'icon-512.png'), (180,'apple-touch-icon.png')]:
    pass  # already written above for those paths

# favicon for homepage: app/icon - Next prefers icon.svg or icon.png in app/
# write app/icon.png and keep updating icon.svg later
square_icon(64).save('/Users/amin/dev/p-projects/armenia/resume/homepage/app/icon.png', 'PNG')
print('wrote homepage/app/icon.png')

python3 << 'PY'
from PIL import Image
import os

src = '/Users/amin/.cursor/projects/Users-amin-dev-p-projects-armenia-resume/assets/telegram-cloud-document-4-5967486840201028313-774e7825-d2b7-487e-a44d-2128f3c3f99e.png'
im = Image.open(src).convert('RGBA')
# crop bird region (before text starts ~672)
bird = im.crop((250, 190, 780, 660))
pixels = bird.load()
w, h = bird.size
for y in range(h):
    for x in range(w):
        r, g, b, a = pixels[x, y]
        # distance from white
        d = ((255-r)**2 + (255-g)**2 + (255-b)**2) ** 0.5
        if d < 8:
            alpha = 0
        elif d < 33:
            alpha = int((d - 8) / 25 * 255)
        else:
            alpha = 255
        pixels[x, y] = (r, g, b, alpha)

bbox = bird.getbbox()
bird = bird.crop(bbox)
pad = 24
canvas = Image.new('RGBA', (bird.width + pad*2, bird.height + pad*2), (0,0,0,0))
canvas.paste(bird, (pad, pad), bird)
print('final', canvas.size)

paths = [
  '/Users/amin/dev/p-projects/armenia/resume/homepage/public/brand/kuchup-bird.png',
  '/Users/amin/dev/p-projects/armenia/resume/relocation_jobs/static/icons/kuchup-bird.png',
]
for p in paths:
    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(p), exist_ok=True)
    canvas.save(p, 'PNG')
    print('wrote', p)

def square_icon(size, opaque_bg=None):
    margin = int(size * 0.08)
    inner = size - margin*2
    fitted = canvas.copy()
    fitted.thumbnail((inner, inner), Image.Resampling.LANCZOS)
    if opaque_bg:
        sq = Image.new('RGBA', (size, size), opaque_bg)
    else:
        sq = Image.new('RGBA', (size, size), (0,0,0,0))
    sq.paste(fitted, ((size-fitted.width)//2, (size-fitted.height)//2), fitted)
    return sq

# brand assets
square_icon(32).save('/Users/amin/dev/p-projects/armenia/resume/homepage/public/brand/icon-32.png', 'PNG')
# overwrite panel icons
for size, name, bg in [
    (192, 'icon-192.png', None),
    (512, 'icon-512.png', None),
    (180, 'apple-touch-icon.png', (248, 248, 246, 255)),
]:
    ic = square_icon(size, opaque_bg=bg)
    dest = f'/Users/amin/dev/p-projects/armenia/resume/relocation_jobs/static/icons/{name}'
    ic.save(dest, 'PNG')
    print('wrote', dest)

square_icon(64).save('/Users/amin/dev/p-projects/armenia/resume/homepage/app/icon.png', 'PNG')
print('wrote homepage/app/icon.png')
# also copy bird into static homepage for built site

arguments.command:
python3 << 'PY'
from PIL import Image
import base64, io, os

bird = Image.open('/Users/amin/dev/p-projects/armenia/resume/homepage/public/brand/kuchup-bird.png')
# favicon-sized with light plate for visibility in tabs
size = 64
margin = 6
fitted = bird.copy()
fitted.thumbnail((size - margin*2, size - margin*2), Image.Resampling.LANCZOS)
plate = Image.new('RGBA', (size, size), (247, 246, 243, 255))
plate.paste(fitted, ((size-fitted.width)//2, (size-fitted.height)//2), fitted)

buf = io.BytesIO()
plate.save(buf, format='PNG')
b64 = base64.b64encode(buf.getvalue()).decode('ascii')
svg = f'''<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 {size} {size}" width="{size}" height="{size}">
  <image href="data:image/png;base64,{b64}" width="{size}" height="{size}" />
</svg>
'''
paths = [
  '/Users/amin/dev/p-projects/armenia/resume/homepage/app/icon.svg',
  '/Users/amin/dev/p-projects/armenia/resume/relocation_jobs/static/homepage/icon.svg',
]
for p in paths:
  with open(p, 'w') as f:
    f.write(svg)
  print('wrote', p, 'bytes', len(svg))

# also keep app/icon.png as the plate version for Next metadata
plate.save('/Users/amin/dev/p-projects/armenia/resume/homepage/app/icon.png', 'PNG')
print('updated app/icon.png')

Done. The site now uses your bird mark only — no “KUCHUP” / “MIGRATE. CATCH UP.” text.

**What changed**
- Cropped the bird from your image and saved it as `/static/icons/kuchup-bird.png`
- Swapped it into the homepage header, panel/login headers, favicon, and app icons
- Put it on a light plate so the navy bird stays readable on the dark UI

Hard-refresh locally (or redeploy) to see it. I can also bump the panel “RJ” avatar to the bird if you want that next.

Let me compare what we have vs the original.

I see the problem — my white-to-transparent conversion mangled the edges. The bird has dark halos and lost crispness. I need to do a clean crop directly from the original JPEG without the pixel-level color manipulation, just crop the bird region and keep a white background.

arguments.command:
python3 << 'PYEOF'
from PIL import Image
import os

src = '/Users/amin/.cursor/projects/Users-amin-dev-p-projects-armenia-resume/assets/telegram-cloud-document-4-5967486840201028313-774e7825-d2b7-487e-a44d-2128f3c3f99e.png'
im = Image.open(src).convert('RGB')

# Crop bird only — text starts around y=670
# Bird content is roughly y=200-650, x=260-760
bird = im.crop((260, 195, 765, 655))
w, h = bird.size
print(f'bird crop: {w}x{h}')

# Pad to square with white
side = max(w, h) + 40  # 20px margin each side
canvas = Image.new('RGB', (side, side), (255, 255, 255))
canvas.paste(bird, ((side - w) // 2, (side - h) // 2))
print(f'square: {side}x{side}')

# Save main brand asset
dest = '/Users/amin/dev/p-projects/armenia/resume/relocation_jobs/static/icons/kuchup-bird.png'
canvas.save(dest, 'PNG', optimize=True)
print('wrote', dest)

# Generate sized icons — simple resize of the square, white bg
for size, name in [
    (192, 'icon-192.png'),
    (512, 'icon-512.png'),
    (180, 'apple-touch-icon.png'),
]:
    ic = canvas.copy()
    ic.thumbnail((size, size), Image.Resampling.LANCZOS)
    out = Image.new('RGB', (size, size), (255, 255, 255))
    out.paste(ic, ((size - ic.width) // 2, (size - ic.height) // 2))
    p = f'/Users/amin/dev/p-projects/armenia/resume/relocation_jobs/static/icons/{name}'
    out.save(p, 'PNG', optimize=True)
    print('wrote', p)

# Homepage app icon
ic64 = canvas.copy()
ic64.thumbnail((64, 64), Image.Resampling.LANCZOS)
out64 = Image.new('RGB', (64, 64), (255, 255, 255))
out64.paste(ic64, ((64 - ic64.width) // 2, (64 - ic64.height) // 2))
out64.save('/Users/amin/dev/p-projects/armenia/resume/homepage/app/icon.png', 'PNG')
print('wrote homepage/app/icon.png')

# icon.svg — embed the bird as a data URI
import base64, io
buf = io.BytesIO()
canvas_svg = canvas.copy()
canvas_svg.thumbnail((128, 128), Image.Resampling.LANCZOS)
canvas_svg.save(buf, format='PNG', optimize=True)
b64 = base64.b64encode(buf.getvalue()).decode('ascii')
svg = f'''<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
  <image href="data:image/png;base64,{b64}" width="128" height="128" />
</svg>
'''
for p in [
    '/Users/amin/dev/p-projects/armenia/resume/homepage/app/icon.svg',
    '/Users/amin/dev/p-projects/armenia/resume/relocation_jobs/static/homepage/icon.svg',
]:
    with open(p, 'w') as f:
        f.write(svg)
    print('wrote', p)

print('done')
PYEOF
